milestones.title: CART
milestones.idea: Recursive binary splits, one prediction per leaf: the regression tree every booster still grows.

milestones.title: AdaBoost
milestones.idea: Combine many weak learners by reweighting the examples each one gets wrong.

milestones.title: Gradient boosting machines
milestones.idea: Fit each new tree to the gradient of the loss, so boosting becomes gradient descent in function space.

milestones.title: Stochastic gradient boosting
milestones.idea: Subsample the rows before each tree, trading a little bias for lower variance and faster fits.

milestones.title: DART
milestones.idea: Drop a random subset of existing trees before each round, borrowing dropout from neural networks.

milestones.title: Regularized objective
milestones.idea: Score splits with a regularized second-order (Newton) objective and read leaf values from the same gradient and hessian sums.

milestones.title: Weighted quantile sketch
milestones.idea: Propose split points from hessian-weighted quantiles, keeping approximate split finding accurate at scale.

milestones.title: Sparsity-aware split finding
milestones.idea: Learn one default branch direction per split in a single pass over the present values, for missing and implicitly-zero entries.

milestones.title: Histogram binning
milestones.idea: Bucket each feature into a few hundred bins, so splits search over bins, not raw values.

milestones.title: GOSS
milestones.idea: Keep every large-gradient row and subsample the rest, focusing the fit on the hard examples.

milestones.title: EFB
milestones.idea: Bundle mutually exclusive sparse features into one, shrinking the feature count with little accuracy loss.

milestones.title: Leaf-wise growth
milestones.idea: Grow the single highest-gain leaf next instead of a whole level, cutting loss faster per node.

milestones.title: GPU histogram training
milestones.idea: Build the split histograms on the GPU, moving the training bottleneck onto the device.

milestones.title: Oblivious trees
milestones.idea: Use the same split across a whole tree level, giving symmetric trees and branch-free prediction.

milestones.title: Ordered target statistics
milestones.idea: Encode a category by the target mean over only the rows seen before it, so the statistic cannot leak the label.

milestones.title: Ordered boosting
milestones.idea: Score each row with a model trained without it, removing the target leakage of ordinary boosting.

milestones.title: TreeSHAP
milestones.idea: Compute exact Shapley feature attributions for a tree ensemble in polynomial time.

milestones.title: Monotone and interaction constraints
milestones.idea: Constrain a feature's effect to one direction, or restrict which features may interact on a path.

milestones.title: scikit-learn HistGradientBoosting
milestones.idea: Ship a histogram gradient-boosting estimator in the standard scikit-learn API.

milestones.title: Cross-architecture reproducibility
milestones.idea: Produce byte-identical models across host architectures at a fixed thread count.

milestones.title: Device-resident objective
milestones.idea: Derive each tree's gradients on the GPU and fuse leaf values into resident scores, deleting the per-tree host round-trip.

milestones.title: The single-card ceiling
milestones.idea: Measure how large a dataset one GPU trains end to end: a 500M by 100 float32 matrix on one 80GB card.
